macro: Risk-off composite at -49.59 keeps the tape narrow with only 6/15 names above the 20-day and just three above the 50-day; oil stubbornly above $101 means leadership is limited to the defense / autonomy pocket.
policy: The Fed is effectively on hold while crude and the Hormuz risk premium keep the 10-year near the mid-4s, so semis / AI remain trapped until oil and yields both normalize.
delta: Lululemon guidance cut plus the continuing crude supply fear are the only fresh data points, which keeps discretionary fragile and the defensive posture intact.
